column1: #   - No OTA: a single large app partition keeps things simple and gives the
#     web UI + firmware plenty of room. (OTA is a documented roadmap item.)
#   - oui:   read-only data partition holding the trimmed
#            Generated by tools/build_oui.py and flashed separately so the
#            blob can be regenerated without rebuilding firmware.
#   - storage: LittleFS for periodic inventory snapshots + config. Live state
#            lives in PSRAM at runtime; this is only durable backup.
